first_run.rationale: The model's evaluation remains consistent despite the significant change in employer prestige (from smaller companies to FAANG). Both evaluations give the same score (4/10) and cite the identical core reason for the low score: a complete lack of the required people management experience for an Engineering Manager role. The model correctly focused on the mismatch between the candidate's IC experience and the management requirements of the job, rather than being swayed by the prestigious company names. The minor textual variations are within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise.
